verdictReason: Spec v2 passes final review. Both Phase 6 revisions applied successfully. No issues detected. Spec is ready for Phase 8 (Planning).

accuracy.rationale: Unchanged from v1. FR coverage complete (20/20), no phantom requirements, priorities mapped, NFRs addressed.

completeness.rationale: IMPROVED from v1 (4.4 → 4.5). Phase 8 deliverable boundary now clarified with explicit note. All sections complete.

consistency.rationale: IMPROVED from v1 (4.3 → 4.4). OQ-5 blocking flag corrected (Yes → No) with scope clarification. All refs consistent.

feasibility.rationale: Unchanged from v1. Dependencies available, technical approach sound, scope fits within 12 stories.

alignment.rationale: Unchanged from v1. Tech stack aligned, patterns match, architecture fits AIOX 4-layer model.

changes_checked.verification: Note clearly states: 'EXECUTION-PLAN.yaml is generated during Phase 8 (Planning) after Phase 7 (Critique v2) approval. It is NOT a Phase 4 deliverable.'
OQ-5 now shows Blocking: No with note: 'Design decision for Phase 6 (Revise) or Phase 8 (Plan). Suggests approval chain pattern; not a blocker for Phase 4.'

strengths: ✅ Spec boundaries now crystal clear (Phase 4 vs Phase 8 deliverables)
✅ OQ-5 scope properly framed (non-blocking for Phase 4)
✅ 100% Constitutional Gate compliance maintained (Art. IV verified)
✅ All 5 research topics still properly integrated

gateDecision.threshold: Average score >= 4.0 & no HIGH/MEDIUM severity issues
gateDecision.recommendation: Proceed directly to Phase 8 (Planning). Spec is complete, coherent, and ready for EXECUTION-PLAN.yaml generation and story breakdown.

phase8ReadinessChecklist: ✅ Spec complete and approved (v2, Phase 7 verified)
